title: Bachelorette Parties
metaTitle: Bachelorette Party Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
description: Bachelorette parties at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Tropical cocktails, flamingo taps, pink umbrellas, and a patio steps from the Pacific.
cardDesc: Tropical cocktails, flamingo taps, pink umbrellas, and a patio steps from the beach. Miss B's was made for this.
body: If you're planning a bachelorette party in San Diego, Miss B's Coconut Club is the answer. The tropical cocktails, the copper flamingo taps, the pink fringed umbrellas on the patio, the "In Love With The Coco" sign — it was practically designed for a bachelorette.

Mission Beach location means you're steps from the Pacific and within easy reach of Pacific Beach nightlife. We'll make sure the group has a reserved section, a cocktail package worth celebrating with, and a night that earns its own highlight reel.
includes: Mimosas from the flamingo tap wall
